_comment: FABRICATED example demonstrating how rich a payload CAN be when produced by a non-trivial decider. All factor names, values, weight_hint and score_hint numbers, and rejected_because tags below are illustrative placeholders chosen to exercise the schema shape. They do NOT depict the actual factors, thresholds, weights, or ranking logic used by any real registered decider — that logic is intentionally not shown here. The OSS decision-service stores and renders whatever the registered decider emits; it does not interpret these values.
